understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously, achieving a WIN condition for each level and ultimately the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P in semantic_grid) by 3 pixels per cell in the direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if present; walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates [x,y], updating player.position and id; actions consume steps from a finite per-level budget, with hints like movement.blocked.
